description: Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather handbag from hidekraft. With short handles, legs at the base and stitch detailing, this bag in pink makes for a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Height: 22 cm Length: 35 cmWidth: 9.5 cmMade from genuine leather for durabilityHas one roomy zipped compartment with organiser sleeves and a small zipped pocketOne zipped pocket at the back for enhanced spaceTwo short handles for carrying ease and styleRuched design at the bottom of the bagLegs at the base and brand name embossed on the frontBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
